untranslatable_reason: Signal requires point-and-figure box size and reversal box parameters which are not standard OHLCV indicators. Box size and reversal_boxes are author-defined configuration parameters that cannot be expressed using the allowed indicator set. The exact reversal amount calculation (box_size × reversal_boxes) requires custom box-tracking logic not available in standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: captured the directional reversal concept (price reversing from downtrend lows = current low > previous low). However, the core logic of comparing reversal amount to (box_size × reversal_boxes) cannot be operationalized without access to point-and-figure box construction parameters. This signal requires custom implementation outside the standard indicator framework.
